source_intent.raw_intent: Case 038: I am a nontechnical_business_owner in Africa. Build a srx_ace_build_agent for memory_engrave using the operator_lens. Chaos input type is language_mixed_prompt. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Build an SRX ACE Build Agent that, given a language-mixed prompt from a nontechnical business owner in Africa, produces a governed memory_engrave artifact with explicit validation gates, compiling into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Scope: - The agent shall accept a chaotic input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), parse it through the operator_lens, and output a structured SR8-compilable artifact. The agent must enforce validation gates at each stage: input normalization, constraint extraction, criteria disambiguation, and output formatting. Constraints: - Input may be language-mixed (e.g., English, French, Swahili, Pidgin). - No external API calls beyond Codex runtime. - Output must be strict JSON without markdown fences. - Validation gates must be explicit in the output contract. - Must handle missing context by flagging gaps rather than hallucinating. Success Criteria: - Agent produces a valid SR8 artifact with all five sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract). - Validation gates are documented and traceable in the output. - Artifact compiles without error in SR8 runtime. - Chaotic input is normalized without loss of intent. Output Contract: - format: JSON - sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent - compiled_intent_subsections: Objective; Scope; Constraints; Success Criteria; Output Contract - validation_gates: gate_1_input_normalization: verify language-mixed input is parsed into canonical tokens.; gate_2_constraint_extraction: extract all explicit and implicit constraints from prompt.; gate_3_criteria_disambiguation: resolve ambiguous acceptance criteria via operator_lens heuristics.; gate_4_output_formatting: ensure JSON structure matches schema exactly. - memory_engrave_artifact: The output artifact itself serves as the memory_engrave record, with compiled_intent as the engraved directive.
